mapper.sql: id, pid, director, phone, decription, name, tenant_id, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM ( SELECT @ids AS ids, ( SELECT @ids := GROUP_CONCAT(id) FROM md_org WHERE FIND_IN_SET( pid, @ids ) ) AS cids FROM md_org, (SELECT@ids := #{id} ) b WHERE @ids IS NOT NULL ) t, md_org mo WHERE FIND_IN_SET( mo.id, ids )

SELECT org.name AS orgName, org.id AS orgId, moe.custom_id AS customId FROM md_org org join md_org_external moe on org.id = moe.org_id WHERE
org.id in
#{id}
ORDER BY org.org_order ASC ,org.create_time
